metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.query:
let OktaSignInEvents= dynamic(["user.session.start", "user.session.end"]);
let OutcomeReasonLookup = datatable(EventOriginalResultDetails: string, EventResultDetails: string)[
  "LOCKED_OUT", "User locked",
  "INVALID_CREDENTIALS", "Incorrect password",
  "UNKNOWN_USER", "No such user",
  "VERIFICATION_ERROR", "Incorrect key",
  "SSO_AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE", "Logon violates policy",
  "PASSWORD_EXPIRED", "Password expired",
  "USER_ACCOUNT_EXPIRED", "Account expired",
  "DEL_AUTH_TIMEOUT", "Session expired",
  "PASSWORD_BASED_LOGIN_DISALLOWED", "Logon violates policy"
];
let SrcDeviceTypeLookup = datatable(OriginalClientDevice: string, SrcDeviceTypeMapped: string)
[
  "Computer", "Computer",
  "Mobile", "Mobile Device",
  "Tablet", "Mobile Device"
];
let parser = (disabled: bool) {
  OktaSystemLogs
  | where not(disabled)
  | where EventOriginalType in (OktaSignInEvents)
  | extend
    Type = "OktaSystemLogs",
    EventVendor = "Okta",
    EventProduct = "Okta",
    EventSchema = "Authentication",
    EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.3",
    EventCount = int(1),
    EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
    EventEndTime = TimeGenerated
  | lookup OutcomeReasonLookup on EventOriginalResultDetails
  | extend EventResultDetails = iff(EventResult == "Failure", coalesce(EventResultDetails, "Other"), "")
  | lookup SrcDeviceTypeLookup on OriginalClientDevice
  | extend
    EventType = iff(EventOriginalType hassuffix 'start', "Logon", "Logoff"),
    ActingAppName,
    ActingAppType,
    TargetSessionId = ActorSessionId,
    TargetUserId = ActorUserId,
    TargetUserIdType = ActorUserIdType,
    ActorUsername = coalesce(ActorUsername, OriginalActorAlternateId),
    ActorUsernameType,
    TargetUsername = ActorUsername,
    TargetUsernameType = ActorUsernameType,
    TargetUserType = ActorUserType,
    EventResult,
    EventSeverity,
    HttpUserAgent,
    DvcAction,
    EventMessage,
    EventOriginalResultDetails,
    EventOriginalType,
    EventOriginalUid,
    LogonMethod,
    EventOriginalSeverity = OriginalSeverity,
    ActorOriginalUserType = OriginalUserType,
    SrcIsp,
    SrcIpAddr,
    SrcGeoRegion,
    SrcGeoLongitude = toreal(SrcGeoLongtitude),
    SrcGeoLatitude = toreal(SrcGeoLatitude),
    SrcGeoCountry,
    SrcGeoCity,
    SrcDvcOs,
    SrcDvcId,
    SrcDvcIdType,
    SrcDeviceType = SrcDeviceTypeMapped
  // Aliases
  | extend
    User = TargetUsername,
    Dvc = EventVendor,
    IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
    Src = SrcIpAddr
  | project
    TimeGenerated,
    Type,
    EventVendor,
    EventProduct,
    EventSchema,
    EventSchemaVersion,
    EventCount,
    EventStartTime,
    EventEndTime,
    EventResultDetails,
    EventType,
    ActingAppName,
    ActingAppType,
    TargetSessionId,
    TargetUserId,
    TargetUserIdType,
    ActorUsername,
    ActorUsernameType,
    TargetUsername,
    TargetUsernameType,
    TargetUserType,
    EventResult,
    EventSeverity,
    HttpUserAgent,
    DvcAction,
    EventMessage,
    EventOriginalResultDetails,
    EventOriginalType,
    EventOriginalUid,
    LogonMethod,
    EventOriginalSeverity,
    ActorOriginalUserType,
    SrcIsp,
    SrcIpAddr,
    SrcGeoRegion,
    SrcGeoLongitude,
    SrcGeoLatitude,
    SrcGeoCountry,
    SrcGeoCity,
    SrcDvcOs,
    SrcDvcId,
    SrcDvcIdType,
    SrcDeviceType,
    User,
    Dvc,
    IpAddr
};
parser(disabled = disabled)
